creator: mmoll@freebsd.org
text:
deleted files: files/patch-lib-facter-processor.rb

- As per communication with demon@ it's OK to remove that patch now as
  processorcount got fixed upstream and processor is better with the upstream
  default of hw.model.

- The zpool version patch has to stay until
  https://tickets.puppetlabs.com/browse/FACT-594 is resolved.

- FreeBSD/ia64 also has dmidecode.

- I tested this on amd64 and sparc64.
